subcodes.first_line: O Wise and Merciful One! This is a Day which hath had no peer nor likeness, nor shall ever have one. The Speaker of Sinai hath appeared and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حکیم رحیم امروز روزیست که شبه و نظیر نداشته و نخواهد داشت مکلم طور ظاهر و
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
